changelog:
v1.1.5 (2026-05-11)

[Stability] Add render telemetry to Supabase for stage timing and per-scene render timing.
[Stability] Add NVENC preflight and whole-job fallback to libx264 when NVENC fails.
[Smoothness] Run FFmpeg/ffprobe at below-normal Windows priority so employee machines stay more responsive.
[Render] Fix FFmpeg filter-thread option placement and log filter thread count.
